name: api-testing-newman-ci
description: Postman/Newman API testing package for local runs and GitLab CI/CD.

scripts.test:api:report: mkdir -p reports && newman run postman/QA_API_Training_Lab.postman_collection.json -e postman/QA_API_Training_Lab.postman_environment.json -r cli,htmlextra,junit --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-report.html --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-junit.xml
scripts.test:api:ci: mkdir -p reports && newman run postman/QA_API_Training_Lab.postman_collection.json -e postman/QA_API_Training_Lab.postman_environment.json --env-var baseUrl=$API_BASE_URL --env-var loginEmail=$LOGIN_EMAIL --env-var loginPassword=$LOGIN_PASSWORD -r cli,htmlextra,junit --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-report.html --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-junit.xml
